{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Invasion of Visiria
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Invasion of Visiria]] is a major news topic.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
